tool_calls.name: execute_python
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"# Get high-urgency, triggered incidents from PagerDuty
high_triggered_incidents = pagerduty.list_incidents(status="triggered", urgency="high")

# Count the incidents
count = len(high_triggered_incidents)

# Get the IDs
ids = [incident["id"] for incident in high_triggered_incidents]

# Return both count and IDs
{"count": count, "ids": ids}"}
